requirement.description: The gateway shall maintain the defined scaling, unit, and valid range when forwarding vehicle speed information.

test_cases.title: Verify GW forwards speed with correct scaling factor (0.1)
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; ECM transmitting ECM_VehicleData; CAN bus active; CAN monitoring tool configured for message ID 0xC8.
steps: Set ECM VehicleSpeed raw value to 100 (representing 10.0 km/h).

test_cases.title: Verify GW preserves unit (km/h)
test_cases.expected_result: GW_SpeedOut represents 50 km/h (not mph or altered unit).

test_cases.title: Verify GW forwards minimum valid value (0 km/h)
Verify GW forwards maximum valid value (250 km/h)
test_cases.expected_result: GW_SpeedOut = 250 km/h with no overflow or wrap-around.

test_cases.title: Verify GW does not exceed defined upper range
steps: Force ECM to transmit speed above 250 km/h.

test_cases.title: Verify raw-to-physical value mapping consistency
Verify GW does not apply offset to speed signal
